title: Decision-focused Combinatorial Optimization
description: I develop learning-to-optimize methods for NP-hard routing and allocation problems. The goal is to improve decision quality under uncertainty while preserving practical runtime constraints.

papers.title: Robust Graph Policies for Combinatorial Optimization

title: Efficient Scientific Foundation Models
description: I investigate sparse architectures and compression-aware training to build scientific models that are both accurate and efficient on limited compute.

papers.title: Sparse Scientific Transformers for PDE Surrogates
A Practical Survey of Neural Architecture Search in Science

title: Multimodal Learning for Scientific Data
description: My recent work focuses on aligning text, simulation outputs, and structured measurements into robust shared representations for downstream forecasting and control.

papers.title: Representation Alignment for Scientific Multimodal Models
